 ${{ '%.2f'|format(item.price|float) }}
K: {{ item.calories if item.calories is not none else 'N/A' }}, P: {{ item.protein if item.protein is not none else 'N/A' }}g, C: {{ item.carbohydrates if item.carbohydrates is not none else 'N/A' }}g, F: {{ item.fats if item.fats is not none else 'N/A' }}g
